properties.name: jwt-config.jwt-private-key
properties.description: PEM-encoded RSA private key used to sign JWT tokens.

properties.name: jwt-config.jwt-public-key
properties.description: PEM-encoded RSA public key used to verify JWT signatures.

properties.name: jwt-config.jwt-expiry
properties.description: JWT token validity duration in milliseconds.

properties.name: brevo-config.brevo-url
properties.description: Brevo SMTP email API endpoint URL.

properties.name: brevo-config.brevo-api-key
properties.description: Brevo API key for authenticating email API requests.

properties.name: brevo-config.sender.name
properties.description: Display name of the email sender.

properties.name: brevo-config.sender.email
properties.description: Email address of the sender.

properties.name: minio.endpoint
properties.description: MinIO S3-compatible API endpoint URL.

properties.name: minio.public-endpoint
properties.description: Public CDN/HTTP endpoint for serving uploaded objects.

properties.name: minio.access-key
properties.description: MinIO access key (username).

properties.name: minio.secret-key
properties.description: MinIO secret key (password).

properties.name: minio.bucket
properties.description: Default MinIO bucket name for uploads.

properties.name: sso.issuer
properties.description: OIDC issuer URL. Must end with trailing slash for Auth0 SDK iss validation.

properties.name: sso.login.frontend-url
properties.description: URL of the Universal Login frontend; /authorize redirects here with ?login_id.

properties.name: sso.login.base-path
properties.description: Base URL of the login frontend app (without path).

properties.name: sso.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated origins allowed to call OAuth/OIDC and auth endpoints.

properties.name: seed-config.client-id
properties.description: OAuth2 client ID seeded on first startup.

properties.name: seed-config.admin-email
properties.description: Admin user email seeded on first startup.

properties.name: seed-config.admin-username
properties.description: Admin username seeded on first startup.

properties.name: seed-config.admin-password
properties.description: Admin password seeded on first startup. Defaults to CursedAdmin@7772 if env var absent.

properties.name: seed-config.redirect-uris
properties.description: Allowed OAuth2 redirect URI(s) for the seeded client.

properties.name: seed-config.logout-uris
properties.description: Allowed post-logout redirect URI(s) for the seeded client.
